BASELIB-RITUAL.title: Ritual
BASELIB-RITUAL.description: You need to [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold]. If the [gold]exhausted[/gold] card is a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] the effects of this card resolve.
BASELIB-DOOMED.title: Doomed
BASELIB-DOOMED.description: If you discard this card at the end of your turn, it gets played for free, but in a weaker form. Add {Doomed} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] to yourself.
BASELIB-CORRUPTED.title: Cursed
BASELIB-CORRUPTED.description: If you discard this card at the end of your turn, it gets played for free, but in a weaker form. Shuffle {Corrupted} random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] into your [gold]Deck[/gold] and add {Corrupted} [gold]Frail[/gold] for [gold]Skills[/gold] or [gold]Weak[/gold] for [gold]Attacks[/gold] to yourself.
